articles.title: India likely to boost urea imports beyond 17 LT as tender prices plunge over 50%
articles.excerpt: Following significantly lower-than-expected bids for National Fertilizer Ltd (NFL)’s recent 1.7-million-tonne urea import tender, the Indian government is reportedly weighing plans to increase its purchase volume, provided suppliers match the current rates.

articles.title: £13.3bn tax breaks for oil and gas firms could have funded 7 years of support for North Sea workers – Greenpeace
articles.excerpt: New figures quietly released by the UK government reveal the astronomical scale of taxpayer support enjoyed by the fossil fuel industry – totaling £13.3 billion in tax breaks over a seven-year period. This figure excludes tax reliefs paid to oil companies for…

articles.title: Sweden drops plan to lower age of criminal responsibility to 13
articles.excerpt:
Sweden’s government withdraws proposal to lower criminal age to 13, citing lack of parliamentary support. A revised plan to lower the age to 14 is expected

articles.title: India news: New Delhi protests US strike that killed 3 Indian sailors, summons envoy
articles.excerpt: India summoned a senior US diplomat and lodged a formal protest after a US strike on the tanker Settebello off Oman. Meanwhile, the 'Cockroach' party demonstrated in Pune demanding the education minister's removal.
